input.prompt: I need a template for creating gRPC services in .NET. Search for available gRPC templates — both installed locally and on NuGet.org. Tell me which package to install.

data.content: I need a template for creating gRPC services in .NET. Search for available gRPC templates — both installed locally and on NuGet.org. Tell me which package to install.
data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-05-16T00:50:35.637Z</current_datetime>

I need a template for creating gRPC services in .NET. Search for available gRPC templates — both installed locally and on NuGet.org. Tell me which package to install.

input.initialPrompt: I need a template for creating gRPC services in .NET. Search for available gRPC templates — both installed locally and on NuGet.org. Tell me which package to install.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Search for gRPC templates locally and on NuGet

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Search for gRPC templates locally and on NuGet

data.reasoningText: The user wants to find gRPC templates for .NET. I'll search both locally installed templates and NuGet.org for available gRPC templates.

arguments.description: Search for gRPC templates locally and on NuGet

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new search grpc 2>&1 | head -40", "description": "Search for gRPC templates locally and on NuGet", "initial_wait": 15}

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new list grpc 2>&1", "description": "List locally installed gRPC templates", "initial_wait": 10}

toolResult.textResultForLlm:
These templates matched your input: 'grpc'

Template Name              Short Name  Language  Tags                
-------------------------  ----------  --------  --------------------
ASP.NET Core gRPC Service  grpc        [C#]      Web/gRPC/API/Service
<exited with exit code 0>

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Get details on the installed gRPC template

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Get details on the installed gRPC template

data.reasoningText: The local search shows there's already a gRPC template installed. The NuGet search failed, but let me try to get more info about the installed template and also try a web search for the NuGet package.

arguments.description: Get details on the installed gRPC template

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new grpc --help 2>&1 | head -20", "description": "Get details on the installed gRPC template", "initial_wait": 10}

toolArgs.description: Get details on the installed gRPC template

toolResult.textResultForLlm:
ASP.NET Core gRPC Service (C#)
Author: Microsoft
Description: A project template for creating a gRPC service using ASP.NET Core, with optional support for publishing as native AOT.

Usage:
  dotnet new grpc [options] [template options]

Options:
  -n, --name <name>       The name for the output being created. If no name is specified, the name of the output 
                          directory is used.
  -o, --output <output>   Location to place the generated output.
  --dry-run               Displays a summary of what would happen if the given command line were run if it would result 
                          in a template creation. [default: False]
  --force                 Forces content to be generated even if it would change existing files. [default: False]
  --no-update-check       Disables checking for the template package updates when instantiating a template. [default: 
                          False]
  --project <project>     The project that should be used for context evaluation.
  -lang, --language <C#>  Specifies the template language to instantiate.
  --type <project>        Specifies the template type to instantiate.
<exited with exit code 0>
